problem: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost?
hypothesis: How to produce defect-free large-area graphene at low cost? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Bacteriophage. Bacteriophage surface display for targeting directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 34 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
